info.title: AnswerLoops
info.description: AnswerLoops' primary agent integration is the MCP server (JSON-RPC 2.0 over Streamable HTTP) at POST /api/mcp, not a REST API — see https://docs.answerloops.com/integrations/mcp for the full tool surface (search_kb, get_faq, get_tickets, create_ticket, generate_answer) and client configuration. This document only covers the one REST endpoint the service exposes.
